plugins.name: super-ralph
plugins.description: Design-first autonomous development workflow. /design produces implementation-ready epics with [STORY]/[BE]/[FE]/[INT] sub-issues. v0.11.0 adds --local mode (write entire plan to a single markdown file, skip GitHub) and /improve-design (single-prompt adjustments to existing designs). Fire-and-forget build → review → verify → release pipelines. Domain-aware repair with hotfix flow.
